title: rubus × platydeltus
intro: Rubus × platydeltus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × platydeltus include its high content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other phenolic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × platydeltus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers. Rubus × platydeltus can be prepared as a herbal tea, jam, or tincture, and it is also used as a nutritional supplement in the form of capsules or powders.
